channel.title: CastLog Field Notes
channel.description: Fast logging, AI patterns, and the apps that get in your way.

item.title: Log a Catch in Under 5 Seconds (No Phone Tantrum)
item.description: Fast catch logging with CastLog: 3 taps, under 5 seconds, even with wet hands. More data means better patterns and more fish.

item.title: The Fishbrain Alternative Anglers Want in 2026
item.description: Fishbrain's $80/yr paywall and offline failures are pushing anglers away. Here's why CastLog is the fishbrain alternative built for how you actually fish.
